Matte MetalSoccer

Ready to Grade / Autographed / Serial Numbered

Every card is an autograph or unsigned base parallel, serial numbered by foil board, and produced sealed and ready for third-party grading. Multi-signature Duals and Triples are each one-of-one.

Subsets & Numbering

Each subset has separate Autograph and Base versions — toggle between them to see the right card code, sample art, and print runs. Autograph codes append a trailing A after the player initials (shown as ‹INI›). Signed cards are one-of-one; unsigned base parallels follow the foil rarity ladder.

SIGNED1/1 Autographed card BASE/10 Unsigned base parallel, numbered to print run 1/1 = one-of-one · /N = numbered to N
Matte Metal · RTG SoccerProduction Checklist · v2◆ Wild Card

Checklist generated from the production master for grading submission and collector reference. Print runs shown are per foil board: autographs are one-of-one and unsigned base parallels are numbered to the figures listed. Dual and Triple autograph parallels are each produced as a single one-of-one. Player names are listed as recorded in production and span legends and active players across eras.
